review_meta.project: Modern Data Structures and Algorithms in Go (DSAG) — Hugo static site

gaps: Section 'Background & Philosophy' appears in every sampled chapter but is NOT defined in the template — new sections grew organically outside the spec
Section 'Use Cases' appears in every sampled chapter but is NOT defined in the template
Section 'Memory Mechanics' appears in every sampled chapter but is NOT defined in the template
Template mandates 'Decision Matrix' but ZERO of 6 sampled chapters have one
Template mandates 'Edge Cases & Pitfalls' but ZERO of 6 sampled chapters have one
Template mandates 'Quick Reference' table but ZERO of 6 sampled chapters have one
No guidance on Indonesian-vs-English language choice — template uses Indonesian ('Pakai <Ini> Kalau...') but chapters are entirely in English
No style guide for alert icon choices — inconsistent usage across parts

template_compliance.explanation: Chapters follow a different structure from what AGENTS.md mandates. Chapters have 'Background & Philosophy', 'Use Cases', 'Memory Mechanics' sections not in the template. Chapters lack 'Decision Matrix', 'Edge Cases & Pitfalls', 'Quick Reference' sections that ARE in the template. The template appears aspirational; actual chapters evolved differently.

rules_compliance.rule_2_no_language_mixing: PASS — Go code is idiomatic Go
rules_compliance.rule_4_no_historical_background: VIOLATED — EVERY sampled chapter has a 'Background & Philosophy' section that includes history. Part VIII is entirely historical. Rule contradicts actual content and Part VIII's existence.
rules_compliance.rule_6_must_include_decision_matrix: FAIL — none of 6 sampled chapters include one
rules_compliance.rule_8_must_include_anti_patterns: FAIL — no dedicated anti-patterns section found in sampled chapters
rules_compliance.rule_9_must_include_Big_O_table: PASS — Big-O tables present in all sampled chapters
rules_compliance.rule_10_code_max_40_lines: PASS — code blocks are reasonably sized

recommendations: Update template in AGENTS.md to match actual chapter structure (add Background & Philosophy, Use Cases, Memory Mechanics sections)
OR update all chapters to include missing Decision Matrix, Edge Cases, and Quick Reference sections

Reconcile Rule 4 (NO historical background) with Part VIII (History & Philosophy) and 'Background & Philosophy' sections present in all chapters — either remove the rule or rename/restructure Part VIII
Add a language policy section (English vs Indonesian for section headers)
Add guidance on alert icon selection consistency
Clarify the template is a 'recommended structure' vs 'strict requirement'

issues.description: Hugo version mismatch: README says v0.161+, hugo.toml does not specify a minimum version, no theme.lock or go.sum to verify actual compatibility
Go version mismatch: README says Go 1.21+, but go.mod says go 1.24.4. Update README to match actual requirement.
Build command inconsistency: README says 'hugo --quiet' (line 85) but AGENTS.md says 'hugo --minify --quiet' (line 144). Two documents disagree on build flags.
License section vague: 'See the repository for license details' — but LICENSE file exists in the repo. Should reference it directly.
Project structure diagram missing files: .caveman-rules.md, archetypes/default.md not shown in directory tree
Repository URL in README points to github.com/akmalgomal3/dsag-webbook, but go.mod uses github.com/g45p2l60gg/dsag — fork or local rename mismatch

recommendations: Align Go version to 1.24 (or update README to match go.mod)
Align build command between README and AGENTS.md (add --minify or remove it consistently)
Update license section to directly reference LICENSE file
Update project structure diagram to include archetypes/ and .caveman-rules.md

issues.description: Description text is WRONG. Part V title is 'Sorting & Searching' (Ch 19-22) but the description paragraph talks about 'Divide and Conquer, Dynamic Programming, Greedy Algorithms, and Backtracking' — this is the description for Part VI (Algorithmic Paradigms). Clear copy-paste error.
issues.fix: Replace the description alert with text about sorting algorithms and search techniques.

issues.description: Quote formatting inconsistent: missing <strong> and <em> tags around quote text, has extra leading space, uses en-dash (--) instead of em-dash (---) like other parts
issues.fix: Wrap quote in ... tags, remove leading space, use em-dash consistently

issues.description: Format INCONSISTENCY: Parts I-VII use modern format with {{% alert %}} shortcodes, <center> section header, and {{< chapter-list >}} shortcode. Parts VIII-XII use older format with plain text, no alert shortcodes, markdown bullet-list chapters, and no chapter-list shortcode. This creates visual inconsistency in the book.
issues.fix: Convert Parts VIII-XII to match the Parts I-VII format with alert shortcodes, <center> headers, and {{< chapter-list >}} shortcode.

issues.description: No {{% alert %}} shortcodes at all — uses plain text description unlike Parts I-VII
issues.fix: Convert to alert shortcode format for consistency

issues.description: Quote uses colon instead of em-dash (': Albert Einstein' vs '— Albert Einstein') and lacks <em> tags around quote text unlike parts II-IV
Missing blank line before {{% alert icon="📘"...%}} block (line 10-11 have no blank line after frontmatter)
issues.fix: Add blank line after closing --- before {{% alert %}}

issues.description: Missing blank line between the two alert shortcode blocks (line 14 has no blank line before {{% alert icon="📘"...%}})
issues.fix: Add blank line between alert blocks for readability

recommendations: Fix Part V description immediately (critical content error)
Migrate Parts VIII-XII to consistent alert-shortcode format
Standardize quote formatting across ALL 12 parts
Consider using a Hugo partial for the part header template to enforce consistency

issue.description: Module path uses 'g45p2l60gg' while AGENTS.md and README reference 'akmalgomal3/dsag-webbook'. This is expected if the local working copy is a fork or the user's personal clone. Flagged in case it causes build issues or confusion.
issue.note_on_dependency: Single dependency on hugo-mod-bootstrap-scss/v5 v5.20300.20800 — reasonable for a Hugo theme

caveman_rules_md.note: AI assistant communication style guide, orthogonal to book content. No issues.

archetypes_default_md.note: Standard Hugo archetype using TOML (+++) frontmatter. Note: AGENTS.md chapter template uses YAML (---) frontmatter. Archetype format doesn't match book chapter format, but archetypes are rarely used directly in this project.
archetypes_default_md.recommendation: Consider updating to YAML frontmatter to match actual chapter format, or remove if unused

issues.description: theme is set to empty array '[]'. No theme is defined. If the site relies on a custom theme or the hugo-mod-bootstrap-scss module, this should be explicitly configured.
No min_version specified for Hugo, while AGENTS.md and README require v0.161+

summary.chapter_count_confirmed: 60 chapters across 12 parts — all files present
